title: Science-First Swarm Refactor
description: Complete refactor of agent-swarm-template to science-first architecture. 9 roles, 4 workflow modes, 4 rigor levels, OODA loop, evidence system, belief maps, investigation journal.

title: Refactor CLAUDE.md: add evidence standards, rigor gates, investigation protocol, scientific integrity
description: Add 4 new sections to CLAUDE.md: Evidence Standards (Analytical+ rigor), Rigor Gates, Investigation Protocol (read journal + belief map before starting), Scientific Integrity (pre-reg binding, negative results valued, no cherry-picking). See DESIGN.md Section 12.
notes: DESIGN UPDATE: ADDED: Session Recovery Protocol section (10-step state reconstruction). ADDED: Misclassification correction rules (user can override mode/rigor at plan or mid-flight, de-escalation requires user confirmation). ADDED: User interaction model rules (mandatory touchpoints vs informational updates).

title: Refactor merge.prompt.md: finding gates + knowledge store
description: Add finding gate verification (check STAT_QUALITY and REVIEWED_BY). Add knowledge store acceptance: update belief map, append to journal. Scientific+ requires Statistician AND Critic review.
notes: RIGOR UPDATE: Quality gate must enforce structured Critic checklist (5 named checks), power analysis validation, data integrity hash verification, sensitivity analysis reporting.

title: Refactor spawn.prompt.md: methodologist gate check
description: Add Methodologist review gate check for investigation tasks at Scientific+ rigor. If not reviewed, dispatch Methodologist first and queue the investigator.
notes: DESIGN UPDATE: ADDED: Classification override support (--mode and --rigor flags). ADDED: Scout skip for pure Build mode.

title: Create investigation-protocol skill
description: New skill .github/skills/investigation-protocol/SKILL.md. Covers: pre-experiment reading (journal, belief map, findings), experimental design pre-registration, running experiments, analysis, reporting, creating findings.
notes: DESIGN UPDATE: ADDED: Investigation Bootstrap section (hypothesis generation from Scout brief, prior assignment, Theorist refinement at Scientific+). ADDED: Replication Termination rules (max 2 per finding, majority, CONTESTED). ADDED: Cycle limit awareness (max_investigation_cycles from config).

title: Create evidence-system skill
description: New skill .github/skills/evidence-system/SKILL.md. Covers: findings in Beads (schema, listing), investigation journal location and format, belief map CRUD, raw data conventions, consuming evidence at agent startup.
notes: DESIGN UPDATE: ADDED: Belief map bootstrap protocol (who creates initial map, how priors are assigned). ADDED: Convergence regression semantics (convergence is a confidence meter, not a progress bar). ADDED: CONTESTED finding state (when 2 replications disagree).

title: Create investigator-prompt.md template
description: New template templates/investigator-prompt.md. Template for investigator agent prompts with: task ID, hypothesis, method, controls, expected result, data directory, pre-registration fields.

title: Create .swarm/journal.md template
description: Create .swarm/journal.md investigation journal template. Header and format for Synthesizer to append OODA cycle entries.

title: Update AGENTS.md: add finding protocol
description: Add Finding Protocol subsection under Issue Tracking with bd. Document structured finding creation: commit raw data, create finding in Beads with TYPE/VALENCE/CONFIDENCE/EFFECT_SIZE/CI/STAT_TEST/P/DATA_FILE.

title: Refactor templates: agent-prompt, standup-report, epic-template
description: Update agent-prompt.md with investigation fields. Update standup-report.md with Belief Map, Findings, Working Theory, Convergence sections. Update epic-template.md with hypothesis list, rigor level, info-gain.
notes: DESIGN UPDATE: ADDED: Classification display and override hint in agent-prompt.md template. ADDED: Convergence regression display in standup-report.md template.

title: Update swarm-init.sh: create .swarm dir + rigor config
description: Add .swarm directory creation and journal.md initialization to swarm-init.sh. Add rigor config block to .swarm-config.json template.
notes: OVERLAP: swarm-init.sh also modified by multi-project epic (agent-swarm-template-wwe). Phase 1 adds project_id, hub registration, namespaced paths. Coordinate with that epic's Phase 1 task.

title: Update README.md for science-first design
description: Update README.md to reflect science-first architecture: 9 roles, 4 modes, 4 rigor levels, evidence system. Update repository structure diagram, commands table, and How It Works section.
notes: DESIGN UPDATE: ADDED: Platform-agnostic design explanation (Claude Code vs Copilot are alternative execution environments). ADDED: User interaction model summary. ADDED: Session recovery documentation.

title: Refactor swarm-orchestrator.agent.md: classifier + OODA workflow + rigor
description: Replace Core Responsibilities (8-item: Classify, Plan, Cast, Dispatch, Monitor, Synthesize, Merge, Converge). Replace linear Workflow with OODA loop. Add Rigor Classification table, Info-Gain Prioritization formula, Paradigm Check, Bias Monitor. See DESIGN.md Sections 4, 5, 8.
notes: RIGOR UPDATE: Orchestrator manages partial blinding, adversarial loop escalation, consistency gate enforcement. Gate chain expanded 5->8 steps.

title: Update task-planning skill for investigation mode
description: Add investigation task planning to task-planning/SKILL.md: hypothesis formulation, info-gain ranking, investigation task schema, theory task creation, replication task triggers.
notes: DESIGN UPDATE: ADDED: Investigation Bootstrap step in planning workflow (hypothesis generation from Scout brief, prior calibration, Theorist refinement). ADDED: Replication Termination rules for planners to reference.

title: Refactor worker-agent.agent.md: evidence standards + dual completion checklist
description: Add Evidence Standards section (Analytical+ rigor). Add Unexpected Findings section with SERENDIPITY flag. Replace single Completion Checklist with separate Build Task and Investigation Task checklists.

title: Create theorist.agent.md
description: New agent .github/agents/theorist.agent.md. Causal model builder: reads synthesized findings + belief map + journal, constructs explanatory models, generates testable predictions, monitors paradigm stress.
notes: DESIGN UPDATE: ADDED: Investigation Bootstrap role. Theorist is now also activated during bootstrap (before OODA loop) at Scientific+ rigor to refine orchestrator-generated hypotheses, calibrate priors, add mechanistic hypotheses, and identify duplicates. This is in addition to the existing post-Synthesizer activation.

title: Create methodologist.agent.md
description: New agent .github/agents/methodologist.agent.md. Experimental design reviewer: hypothesis clarity, controls, sample size, stat plan, pre-reg compliance. Approve/reject gate.
notes: RIGOR UPDATE: All 9 role definitions updated with rigor protocols. New section 7.5 defines 10 enforcement mechanisms.

title: Create statistician.agent.md
description: New agent .github/agents/statistician.agent.md. Quantitative rigor gatekeeper: test appropriateness, sample size, effect size, CI, multiple comparisons, red flags, quality score 0-1.
notes: RIGOR UPDATE: Task schema now requires POWER_ANALYSIS and SENSITIVITY_PLAN fields. Finding schema requires DATA_HASH and SENSITIVITY fields.

title: Refactor swarm.prompt.md: classifier + scout + OODA phases
description: Add Phase 0: Classify (mode + rigor). Add Phase 0.5: Scout. Rewrite Phase 1: Plan with mode-specific decomposition. Replace Phase 2 with Cast and Dispatch (role selection table). Replace Phase 3 with OODA Loop.
notes: RIGOR UPDATE: Evidence system includes new 7.5 Scientific Rigor Framework with 10 protocols covering consistency, replication, sensitivity, adversarial review, blinding, SOTA, power analysis, critic checklist, competing theories, data integrity.

title: Refactor standup.prompt.md: scientific rigor sections
description: Add Scientific+ rigor sections: Belief Map, Findings summary, Working Theory, Rigor Compliance, Convergence percentage. Standard rigor output unchanged.
notes: RIGOR UPDATE: Convergence criteria updated. Scientific: zero CONSISTENCY_CONFLICT flags + competing theory ruled out + all findings ROBUST. Experimental: adds TOST replication agreement + power analysis for every experiment.

title: Refactor progress.prompt.md: rigor-aware display
description: Add findings, investigation journal tail, and rigor-aware compact display. Standard rigor shows tasks + worktrees. Analytical+ shows findings. Scientific+ shows belief map, theory, compliance.
notes: RIGOR UPDATE: Dependency gate chain now includes SOTA compliance, data hash recording, sensitivity analysis, partial blinding before Critic, adversarial loop, Synthesizer consistency check.

title: Multi-Project Scalability
description: DESIGN.md §19. Enable running multiple swarm projects simultaneously without collision or cross-contamination. 6 layers: Project Identity, Global Hub, Resource Management, Project Lifecycle, Multi-Project Dashboard, Epic Isolation. 5-phase migration path.

title: Phase 1: Project ID + namespaced resources
description: Add project_id to .swarm-config.json. Namespace tmux sessions (swarm-{project_id}), worktree dirs (~/.swarm/projects/{id}/worktrees/), branch names (swarm/{project_id}/agent-*). Update swarm-init.sh to generate project_id slug with collision detection. Update spawn-agent.sh to use namespaced paths.

title: Phase 2: Global hub registry + swarm hub CLI
description: Create ~/.swarm/hub.json registry. Create scripts/swarm-hub.sh with subcommands: list, switch, pause, resume, remove, dashboard. Register projects at swarm-init.sh. Update teardown.sh to update hub status. Add heartbeat to autopilot.sh.

title: Phase 3: Resource management — global agent pool
description: Create ~/.swarm/resources.json with global_max_agents, API rate limits, allocation_strategy (proportional/priority/equal/manual). Update spawn-agent.sh to check global limits before spawning. Queue tasks when limits hit. Support project-level priorities.

title: Phase 4: Multi-project dashboard
description: Extend scripts/dashboard.py with --hub flag for multi-project TUI view. Show global agent count, per-project status/agents/mode/convergence, API rate usage. Drill-down into single-project view. Keyboard shortcuts for switch/pause/resume.

title: Phase 5: Same-repo epic isolation
description: Support concurrent swarms in same repo via epic scoping. Branch namespace per epic (swarm/{epic-id}/agent-*). Per-epic journal files (.swarm/journal-{epic-id}.md). Orchestrator detects active epic and offers Continue/New/Replace. Beads queries scoped with --parent. Update CLAUDE.md with epic scoping rule for agents.
